elevenlabs.will.notes: Will — modern conversational male. Iter2 pick: holds pauses, reads metrics with a shrug not a pitch. Known-good fallback.

inworld.male19.notes: Nate — 'Conversational, sociable male voice'. Picked 2026-04-24 via description-fit scoring (Jake/Avery/Nate/Tyler candidates). Nate best matches 'friend telling you about a thing he built' brief. Audition files: out/audition-inworld-{Jake,Avery,Nate,Tyler}.mp3.
